Ann Scott Frost
(1538 – July 1588)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Ann was the daughter of Richard & Joanna Scott, a clothier at Glemsford, Suffolk, England. 

She was born about 1535, probably at Glemsford. 

She married John Frost in the church of St. Mary the Virg …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ann Scott於大約1538年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可格萊姆斯福德時，她的父親Richard Scott30歲，母親Joanna24歲。她於1558年1月29日與John Frost在英國英格蘭素福爾可格萊姆斯福德結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1588年7月30日之前在英國英格蘭素福爾可哈斯特，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可哈斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ann Scott于大约1538年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可格萊姆斯福德时，她的父亲Richard Scott30岁，母亲Joanna24岁。她于1558年1月29日与John Frost在英国英格兰素福爾可格萊姆斯福德结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1588年7月30日之前在英国英格兰素福爾可哈斯特，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可哈斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Scott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (Down): habitational and ethnic name from Middle English Scot ‘man from Scotland’. There is no evidence that the surname denoted either of the earlier senses of Scot as ‘(Gaelic-speaking) Irishman’ or ‘man from Alba’, the Gaelic-speaking region of Scotland north of the river Forth. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English and Scottish: from the rare Middle English personal name Scot (Old English Scott, possibly also Old Norse Skotr), only certainly attested in northern England.

variants.name: Scutt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Pierre.
English: nickname for a short person, from Middle English scut(e) ‘short’, or else for a swift runner, from Middle English scut ‘hare’.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

en.lifeSummary: When Ann Scott was born about 1538, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Scott, was 30 and her mother, Joanna, was 24. She married John Frost on 29 January 1558, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 5 daughters. She died before 30 July 1588, in Hartest, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Hartest, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ann Scott est née environ 1538, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Scott, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Joanna, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé John Frost le 29 janvier 1558, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée avant 30 juillet 1588, à Hartest, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Hartest, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ann Scott um 1538 in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Scott 30 und ihre Mutter Joanna 24. Sie hat am 29. Januar 1558 in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom John Frost geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb vor 30. Juli 1588 in Hartest, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hartest, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Scott è nata il circa 1538 nel Glemsford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard Scott, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Joanna, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato John Frost il 29 gennaio 1558, nel Glemsford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 5 figlie. Morì prima del 30 luglio 1588, nel Hartest, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Hartest, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ann Scottが約1538年にイギリスイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードで生まれた時，父Richard Scottは30歳，母Joannaは24歳であった。1558年1月29日にイギリスイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードでJohn Frostと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1588年7月30日以前にイギリスイギリススフォルクハーテストで死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクハーテストにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ann Scott(이)가 대략 1538년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Scott(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanna(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1558년 1월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 John Frost(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1588년 7월 30일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 하츠트에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 하츠트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Scott nasceu aproximadamente 1538, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Scott, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Joanna, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com John Frost em 29 de janeiro de 1558, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 30 de julho de 1588, em Hartest, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Hartest, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ann Scott родилась около 1538 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Scott было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Frost 29 января 1558 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла перед 30 июля 1588 г. в местности хартест, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности хартест, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ann Scott nació aproximadamente 1538, en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Scott, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Joanna, tenía 24 años. Se casó con John Frost el 29 de enero de 1558, en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió antes de 30 de julio de 1588, en Hartest, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Hartest, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
